info.name: Nyife API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Nyife - WhatsApp Marketing SaaS Platform. Includes all microservice endpoints for authentication, user management, subscriptions, wallets, contacts, templates, campaigns, chat, WhatsApp integration, automations, organizations, notifications, emails, support tickets, admin management, analytics, and media.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Enterprise Plan",
  "description": "For large businesses",
  "type": "monthly",
  "price": 499900,
  "max_contacts": 50000,
  "max_templates": 500,
  "max_campaigns_per_month": 200,
  "max_messages_per_month": 200000,
  "max_team_members": 50,
  "max_organizations": 10,
  "max_whatsapp_numbers": 10,
  "has_priority_support": true,
  "marketing_message_price": 50,
  "utility_message_price": 30,
  "auth_message_price": 25,
  "features": {
    "csv_import": true,
    "basic_automations": true,
    "advanced_automations": true,
    "api_access": true
  },
  "sort_order": 3
}
